blocks.text: UCL Knife-Edge Night: Newcastle, Liverpool Must Deliver or Go Home

Wednesday belongs to the Champions League. Two genuine thrillers headline a dramatic European night — Barcelona host Newcastle in a level-aggregate decider, while Liverpool need a famous comeback at Anfield against Galatasaray. Buckle up.
⚽ Newcastle United at Barcelona — level on aggregate, winner-takes-all at Camp Nou
No Norwegian starters in tonight's UCL ties, but the Spring Classics peloton rolls on — Abrahamsen, Leknessund, Bystrøm and Wærenskjold are all racing. Watch for updates from the cobbles.
